zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Valentine Stace於1556年出生在英國時，她的父親Sir William Lawrence Stacie36歲，母親Alice Shirley32歲。她於1575年與Richard Barstow在英國英格蘭越可爾諾萊安結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年9月19日在英國肯特享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Valentine Stace于1556年出生在英国时，她的父亲Sir William Lawrence Stacie36岁，母亲Alice Shirley32岁。她于1575年与Richard Barstow在英国英格兰越可爾諾萊安结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年9月19日在英国肯特享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Sussex and Kent): from the Middle English personal name Stace (Latinized as Stacius), a vernacular form of Eustace . Compare Stacy .

variants.name: Stacy
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Stacy, a diminutive of Stace , a pet form of Eustace .
In some cases an American shortened and altered form of Greek Stasinopoulos, a patronymic from the personal name Stasinos .

variants.name: Eustace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Eustace (male and female), via Old French Eustace (male) from Latin Eustachius, Eustacius, from Greek Eustachios, composed of the elements eu ‘good’ and stachys ‘ear (of grain)’, hence ‘fruitful’. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, but little is known of the most famous Saint Eustace, patron saint of hunters, said to have been converted by the vision of a crucifix between the antlers of a hunted stag. In North America, this surname form of the name may have absorbed Greek surnames based on the similar personal name Efstathios, such as Efstathiadis and Efstathiou . See also Stacey .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Valentine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Valentinus, a derivative of valens ‘healthy, strong’. This was the name of a Roman martyr of the 3rd century, whose feast is celebrated on 14 February . This was the date of a pagan fertility festival marking the first stirrings of spring, which has survived in an attenuated form under the patronage of the saint.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Valentine Stace was born in 1556, in England, her father, Sir William Lawrence Stacie, was 36 and her mother, Alice Shirley, was 32. She married Richard Barstow in 1575, in Northowram, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 19 September 1597, in Kent, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Valentine Stace est née en 1556, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William Lawrence Stacie, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Alice Shirley, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Barstow en 1575, à Northowram, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 septembre 1597, à Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Valentine Stace 1556 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Lawrence Stacie 36 und ihre Mutter Alice Shirley 32. Sie hat 1575 in Northowram, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Barstow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. September 1597 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Valentine Stace è nata il nel 1556 nel England, sua padre, Sir William Lawrence Stacie, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Alice Shirley, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Richard Barstow nel 1575, nel Northowram, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 19 settembre 1597, nel Kent, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Valentine Stace(이)가 1556년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Lawrence Stacie(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Shirley(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1575년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 노르토램에서 Richard Barstow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 9월 19일 영국 켄트에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Valentine Stace nasceu em 1556, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Lawrence Stacie, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Alice Shirley, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Barstow em 1575, em Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de setembro de 1597, em Kent, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Valentine Stace родилась в 1556 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Lawrence Stacie было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Shirley, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Barstow в 1575 г. в местности нортоурам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 19 сентября 1597 г. в местности кэнт, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Valentine Stace nació en 1556, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Lawrence Stacie, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Alice Shirley, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Richard Barstow en 1575, en Northowram, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 19 de septiembre de 1597, en Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
